title: Borrow a wrapper directly in for loops
scenario: For loops over &OrderLines should borrow each line instead of consuming the wrapper.
instructions: Implement IntoIterator for &OrderLines, yielding &OrderLine values and delegating to OrderLines::iter.

hints.body: This implementation makes for line in &lines work.
The item type should be a shared borrow.
Delegate to self.iter() so the iterator logic stays in one place.

completionExplanation: OrderLines now behaves like standard collections in borrowed for loops.
